title: Filter by single brand
description: Verify that when a single brand filter is applied (e.g., 'ASUS MB'), only campaigns related to that brand are displayed in the campaign list.

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Open the brand filter dropdown using the Mantine Select component.
Select the brand 'ASUS MB' from the brand filter dropdown.
Check that the campaign list updates to show only campaigns matching the 'ASUS MB' brand.
Verify that no campaigns from other brands are displayed.

title: Filter by single quarter
description: Verify that selecting a single quarter filter (e.g., 'Q1') filters the campaign list to show only campaigns from that quarter.

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Open the quarter filter dropdown using the Mantine Select component.
Select the quarter 'Q1' from the quarter filter dropdown.
Check that the campaign list updates to show only campaigns from 'Q1'.
Verify that no campaigns from other quarters are displayed.

title: Filter by brand and quarter simultaneously
description: Verify that when both brand (e.g., 'ASUS MB') and quarter ('Q1') filters are applied, the campaign list only shows campaigns that match both criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Select 'ASUS MB' from the brand filter dropdown.
Select 'Q1' from the quarter filter dropdown.
Verify that the campaign list displays only campaigns that match brand 'ASUS MB' and quarter 'Q1'.
Verify that no campaigns outside the selected brand or quarter are shown.

title: Reset filters button functionality
description: Verify that clicking the 'Reset Filters' button clears all selected filters and reloads the full campaign list showing all campaigns.

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Apply multiple filters: select 'ASUS MB' for brand and 'Q1' for quarter.
Click the 'Reset Filters' button.
Verify that all filter selections are cleared.
Verify that the full campaign list reloads and displays all campaigns irrespective of brand or quarter.

title: Filter UI responsiveness on various screen sizes
description: Verify that the filter components and campaign list remain user-friendly and fully functional on different screen sizes (desktop, tablet, mobile).

steps.description: Open the campaign list page on a desktop screen.
Check that Mantine Select components for filtering are displayed properly and are usable.
Resize the viewport to tablet screen dimensions.
Verify the filters maintain visibility and usability without UI breaking.
Resize the viewport to mobile screen dimensions.
Verify the filters and campaign list layout remains user-friendly and functional.

title: Filter with no matching campaigns
description: Verify behavior when filters are selected that yield no matching campaigns, ensuring the UI displays an appropriate message or empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Select a brand and quarter combination for which no campaigns exist.
Verify that the campaign list shows an empty state or message indicating no campaigns match the selected filters.

title: Filter input persistence during navigation
description: Verify that selected filters persist on client side while navigating within the campaign page or returning from details pages, ensuring user selections are retained.

steps.description: Navigate to campaign list page.
Select a brand and quarter filter.
Navigate to a campaign details page and then return to the campaign list.
Verify the previously selected filters are retained and the filtered campaign list is still displayed.

title: Filter components accessibility verification
description: Verify that filter components (Mantine Selects and Reset button) comply with accessibility standards (keyboard navigability, ARIA attributes).

steps.description: Navigate to the campaign list page.
Navigate through filter controls using keyboard only.
Verify that all filter controls receive focus and can be operated by keyboard.
Validate that ARIA labels and roles are correctly set for screen readers.

title: Performance test filtering with large dataset
description: Verify that filtering operations execute efficiently and the UI remains responsive when the campaign list contains a large number of posts.

steps.description: Seed the Firebase database with a large volume of campaign posts with diverse brand and quarter attributes.
Navigate to the campaign list page.
Apply brand and quarter filters.
Verify that filter results appear within acceptable response time (e.g. under 2 seconds).
Verify that the UI does not freeze or become unresponsive during filter operations.
